report.summary: Built 2 new learn pages: Initia (INIT) modular blockchain guide and Kite AI (KITE) AI payment blockchain guide, targeting trending modular L1/L2 and agentic economy narratives in March 2026.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Initia (INIT): Cosmos-based L1 with L2 rollups (Minitias) supporting EVM/MoveVM/WasmVM. Mainnet launched Apr 2025. 11+ Minitias deployed, ~$34M TVL. Co-founded by ex-Terra/Cosmos devs Ezaan Mangalji and Stan Liu. $24M+ raised from Delphi Ventures, Hack VC, Theory Ventures, Binance Labs. 1B token supply, 18.2% unlocked, major cliff unlock April 24 2026. Competing with Celestia, Optimism, Arbitrum in modular space.

Kite AI (KITE): First purpose-built L1 blockchain for AI agent payments. PoS EVM-compatible chain with Agent Passport (KitePass) identity system. $35M raised from PayPal, General Catalyst, Coinbase Ventures. 10B token supply, 48% to community, revenue-driven model with commission swaps and mandatory liquidity locking. ~$513M market cap, +205% YTD. Mainnet launching progressively Q1-Q2 2026.

Both topics are trending March 2026: Initia represents the modular blockchain narrative gaining traction, Kite AI sits at the intersection of AI infrastructure and crypto payments mega-narratives. Neither had existing coverage on degen0x.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Initia (INIT) Blockchain Guide 2026: ~3,200 words covering what it is, Interwoven Stack architecture (L1 orchestration + IBC + OSS shared security), Minitias deep-dive with comparison table vs OP Stack and Cosmos appchains, INIT tokenomics (9 allocation buckets with vesting schedules), team & 4-round funding history ($24M+), ecosystem categories, 5 risk factors (low TVL, unlock pressure, competition, Terra heritage, exchange delistings), 2026 outlook with 3 catalysts, and 6 FAQ entries.

Kite AI (KITE) Guide 2026: ~3,000 words covering what it is, why AI agents need their own blockchain, the Six Pillars framework (trustworthy agents, settlement, dev infra, network ops, AgenticFi, growth engine), Agent Passport (KitePass) 4-step identity system, KITE tokenomics with revenue-driven model (commission swaps, liquidity locking, emissions sunset), team background (Databricks/Uber/UC Berkeley) & $35M funding, 5 risk factors (pre-revenue valuation, mainnet execution, adoption timeline, L1 competition, regulatory uncertainty), 2026 outlook with 4 catalysts, and 6 FAQ entries.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Initia: Title 'Initia (INIT) Guide 2026: Modular Blockchain With Interwoven Rollups | degen0x' (69 chars), target keyword 'initia blockchain guide 2026', 10 keywords array, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG/Twitter cards, canonical URL, internal links to 5 related guides (Modular Blockchain Stack, Appchains & Rollups, Layer 2 Scaling, Chain Abstraction, Cross-Chain Interoperability)

Kite AI: Title 'Kite AI (KITE) Guide 2026: The First AI Payment Blockchain | degen0x' (62 chars), target keyword 'kite ai guide 2026', 10 keywords array, Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, OG/Twitter cards, canonical URL, internal links to 5 related guides (AI Crypto Agents, AI Agent Wallets, Agentic Payments Protocols, AI Agent Frameworks, AI Agent Identity NHI)
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts for next daily promotion cycle
